---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose new functionality for Rigor
labels: kind/feature
---

### Feature request

<!--
Describe the feature. Keep in mind rigor's core framing: external runtime
verification with a full audit trail, not alignment. Features should strengthen
one of the three pillars:

  1. Epistemic grounding (claim extraction, constraint evaluation, DF-QuAD)
  2. Action gates (human-in-the-loop for AI actions)
  3. Epistemic sandbox (auditable, reversible, constraint-aware interactions)

If the feature doesn't map to one of those pillars, explain why rigor is
still the right place for it.
-->

### Use case

<!--
Concrete scenario where this feature would add value. Please include:

  - What agent / LLM the scenario involves (claude / opencode / codex / other)
  - Whether the behavior is for the daemon (always-on) or a one-shot hook
  - Whether you expect configuration via rigor.yaml, an env var, or a CLI flag
-->

### Relation to the roadmap

<!--
Optional: if this matches something in .planning/roadmap/epistemic-expansion-plan.md
or a future epistemology-expansion item, link to the phase. Otherwise fine.
-->
